message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
autonumber

rectangle "Client" as Client
rectangle "Facade" as Facade
rectangle "SystemA" as SystemA
rectangle "SystemB" as SystemB
rectangle "SystemC" as SystemC

Client --> Facade : 1 create
activate Facade
Facade --> SystemA : 2 create
Facade --> SystemB : 3 create
Facade --> SystemC : 4 create
deactivate Facade

Client --> Facade : 5 wrapOpration()
activate Facade
Facade --> SystemA : 6 operationA()
Facade --> SystemB : 7 operationB()
Facade --> SystemC : 8 operation()
deactivate Facade

@enduml
